data.title: Greenberg Traurig's Lily McNulty Named to Az Business Magazine 'Most Influential Women' List
data.description: On July 2, 2026, Lily M. McNulty, a shareholder at Greenberg Traurig, LLP in Phoenix, was named one of Az Business magazine's 2026 Most Influential Women in Arizona Business. This recognition highlights her impact on the business community in Arizona. The editorial board of Az Business magazine collaborated in the selection process, honoring McNulty for her contributions to the industry.

data.title: A New Easterseals Film Puts Family Caregivers at the Center of their Story for America's 250th Anniversary
data.description: A short film on family caregiving was recently unveiled by Easterseals in Chicago on July 2, 2026. This release is part of a larger docuseries commemorating the 250th anniversary of the nation. Easterseals aims to shed light on the pressing issue of providing support for family caregivers. The nonprofit is emphasizing the need to address the needs of these caregivers in the midst of celebrating the nation's milestone.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Leads Broad Tech Drop As Dow Rises Mildly; Dave Up 11% For Week (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today in the stock market, the Dow Jones index experienced a slight increase amidst mixed trading conditions. Despite strong Q2 deliveries, Tesla stock showed a decline. The Nasdaq led a widespread drop in technology stocks, while the Dow saw a mild rise. Overall, Dave's performance for the week has shown an 11% increase.

data.title: Northwest Biotherapeutics Announces Scientific Presentation on Propensity Score Matching at the British Neuro-Oncology Society Annual Meeting
data.description: A biotechnology company, Northwest Biotherapeutics (OTCQB:NWBO), headquartered in Bethesda, Md., shared on July 2, 2026, that Dr. Marnix Bosch, Chief Technical Officer of NWBio, will be involved in the development of DCVax® personalized immune therapies for solid tumor cancers.

data.title: Cosmos Health increases buyback to 3.42M shares, adds 770K, and continues open market purchases.
data.description: A recent report revealed that over 3 million people in the country are facing food insecurity, with children accounting for more than a third of this number. The study highlighted that around 12% of households are experiencing difficulty in accessing adequate and nutritious food. The situation is particularly concerning in urban areas, where the number of food-insecure people has surpassed 1.5 million. The report emphasized the need for urgent action to address this issue and ensure that all individuals have access to sufficient food.

data.title: SpaceX IPO Fireworks Are Triumph Of American Innovation, But China Threat Looms
data.description: The innovative prowess of the United States, demonstrated through milestones like the Model T, SpaceX, and advancements in artificial intelligence, remains a significant driver of the country's economic growth. However, China's emergence as a formidable competitor poses a growing threat. The recent SpaceX IPO exemplifies the success of American innovation, yet the looming presence of China showcases a potential challenge to the U.S. economy.

data.title: Weak Jobs Report Dampens Fed Rate-Hike Odds, But S&P 500 Falls
data.description: In June, the economy added only 57,000 jobs, leading to a decrease in the unemployment rate to 4.2%. This weak jobs report has caused uncertainty regarding potential Federal Reserve rate hikes. Consequently, the S&P 500 experienced a decline in response to this news.

data.title: QuickBox Fulfillment and Motivational Fulfillment Announce Strategic Merger
data.description: Today in Denver, on July 2, 2026, QuickBox Fulfillment and Motivational Fulfillment and Logistics Services disclosed their merger, uniting as industry giants in eCommerce logistics and fulfillment. The merger aims to provide superior multichannel fulfillment services.

data.title: Freedom 250 Announces AI Leader Exiger Is Key Sponsor of 250th Celebrations
data.description: On July 2, 2026, Freedom 250, the designated public-private sponsorship marking America's 250th anniversary, revealed Exiger as an official sponsor for the occasion. Exiger, a prominent AI company specializing in supply chain solutions, will be supporting Freedom 250 and the national festivities commemorating the 250th anniversary of the United States.

data.title: Cloud of Goods Calls for Destination Readiness Ahead of ADA Anniversary, Helping Travelers Plan Mobility, Accessibility, and Medical Gear Before Arrival
data.description: Cloud of Goods is calling on destinations, hotels, travel advisors, and travelers to expand their focus beyond just accessible venues as the July 26 ADA anniversary nears. The Florida-based company emphasized the importance of planning gear support for travelers upon arrival. This message was shared on July 2, 2026 from COCONUT CREEK, Fla. Cloud of Goods urged stakeholders in the travel industry to consider the needs of all travelers, particularly those requiring additional support. As the ADA anniversary approaches, the company highlighted the significance of accommodating diverse requirements and ensuring inclusivity in travel experiences.

data.title: Lotus Infrastructure Partners Announces Agreement to Sell Gulf Coast Ammonia Project to Yara
data.description: Lotus Infrastructure Partners, LP, based in Greenwich, Connecticut, revealed on July 2, 2026, that an affiliate, GCA Holdings LLC, along with MB Energy, has finalized a deal to sell Gulf Coast. The announcement did not disclose the financial figures involved in the agreement.

data.title: In HelloNation, Dental Expert Dustin Plunkett Examines Dental Implants and Bridges for Retirees
data.description: Residents of Kiawah Island, South Carolina, should be aware of the options available for replacing a missing tooth. It can be done through two main methods - dental bridges or dental implants. Differentiating between the two methods is crucial for patients to make an informed decision. As of July 2, 2026, the retirees in Kiawah Island should carefully consider the pros and cons of each option before choosing. Making the right choice between a dental bridge and dental implants is essential for ensuring proper tooth replacement and overall oral health.

data.title: Personal Injury Documentation Beyond Medical Records Explained in HelloNation Featuring Personal Injury Attorney D. Seth Holliday
data.description: An analysis delves into the insufficiency of medical records in capturing the complete essence of pain, restrictions, and emotional anguish following an injury. In Ringgold, Ga., on July 2, 2026, it was questioned whether solely relying on medical records is adequate in demonstrating the total repercussions of a personal injury case in Georgia. HelloNation recently released insights on this matter, shedding light on the potential limitations of traditional medical documentation in showcasing the entirety of an individual's suffering post-injury.

data.title: In HelloNation, Dental Expert Dustin Plunkett Explains Why Routine Dental Checkups Matter for Families
data.description: Regular dental checkups are crucial for families in Johns Island, as they aid in early problem detection and promote long-term oral health. In Johns Island, it is recommended that families schedule dental checkups every six months. During each appointment, individuals can expect a comprehensive oral examination, professional cleaning, and preventive treatments if necessary. These visits play a vital role in maintaining healthy teeth and gums, fostering good oral hygiene practices, and addressing any dental issues promptly.
